column1: # normalizers.tsv — the per-command normalizer allowlist for diffcli (§6.4).
# THE #1 REVIEWER ATTACK SURFACE: a normalizer that hides a real divergence. This file is
# the entire defense. diffcli applies NO normalization except the named list a matching row
# here grants — there is no implicit "clean it up" pass. Every row is:
#     command-glob  <TAB>  comma,sep,normalizer,names  <TAB>  justification
# Rules the W1.6 gate audit enforces (and reviewers check by eye):
#   * The names column draws ONLY from conformance/normalize.ts `registry` keys
#     (tempPaths, cwd, pids, timings, durations, versions). Unknown name => diffcli throws.
#   * BYTE-EXACT wherever deterministic: a command with stable output gets NO normalizers
#     (empty names column is illegal — write the literal `-` to say "byte-exact, none").
#   * Every row needs a justification naming the SPECIFIC nondeterminism it cancels. "misc"
#     / "cleanup" / "flaky" are not justifications.
#   * command-glob is matched most-specific-first; the first match wins; `*` is the floor.
#   * This file lives under the W1.1 ledger hash chain: adding a normalizer to silence a
#     newly-red diff is a chained, visible, attributable event — never a quiet edit.
# command-glob
--version
column3: version output is byte-exact deterministic; NO normalizer may touch the digits

column1: --help
column3: help footer embeds the running Bun version; nothing else varies

column1: --revision
column3: revision string is the pinned build id, byte-exact deterministic

column1: install*
column3: install prints the abs cache/target dir + resolve/link wall-times

column1: add*
column3: same surface as install (writes into node_modules under a temp root)

column1: test*
column3: test reporter prints per-test [Nms] + file paths; counts stay byte-exact

column1: run*
column3: run echoes the script's cwd-relative path + subprocess pids; output bytes exact

column1: build*
column3: bundler prints abs out-dir + "bundled N modules in <time>"
FLOOR: unknown commands are byte-exact by default; add a scoped row, never widen this
